# RIID-4659: Codex Provider

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to macos-provider-cli-review](../macos-provider-cli-review.md)

This slice moves the Codex adapter.

## Moved Surfaces

- `internal/provider/codex`
- Codex adapter testdata
- Provider-runtime and daemon migration documentation
- Public CI for command construction, blocked protocol args, unsafe bypass filtering, `CODEX_HOME` non-materialization, detection, JSONL parsing, raw translation, golden fixtures, JSON-RPC actor, handshake, and protocol-driver approval response

The package owns only the daemon-side C4 adapter ACL for the external Codex CLI app-server stdio mode. It must not bundle, install, or distribute Codex.

Real CLI integration is opt-in with `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1`; public CI stays deterministic and skips real CLI checks when the external CLI is absent.
